'''鈭歭-l-v-dh''' ('''kalalvedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoombomb|zoombomb]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoombomb|zoombomb]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-l-v-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kalalvedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
